meanings.definition: any maneuver made as part of progress toward a goal
examples: the situation called for strong measures
the police took steps to reduce crime

meanings.definition: how much there is or how many there are of something that you can quantify
a statute in draft before it becomes law
examples: they held a public hearing on the bill

meanings.definition: the act or process of assigning numbers to phenomena according to a rule
examples: his mental measurings proved remarkably accurate

meanings.definition: a basis for comparison; a reference point against which other things can be evaluated
examples: the schools comply with federal standards
they set the measure for all subsequent work

meanings.definition: (prosody) the accent in a metrical foot of verse
musical notation for a repeating pattern of musical beats
examples: the orchestra omitted the last twelve bars of the song

meanings.definition: measuring instrument having a sequence of marks at regular intervals; used as a reference in making measurements
a container of some standard capacity that is used to obtain fixed amounts of a substance
determine the measurements of something or somebody, take measurements of
examples: Measure the length of the wall

meanings.definition: express as a number or measure or quantity

examples: This table surfaces measures 20inches by 36 inches

meanings.definition: evaluate or estimate the nature, quality, ability, extent, or significance of
examples: I will have the family jewels appraised by a professional
access all the factors when taking a risk
